version.description: API version identifier for endpoint routing

put.summary: Update Workflow Rule For the Given ID in Body
put.description: Updates an existing workflow rule with partial data.

get.description: To retrieve the list of Workflow rules

put.description: Updates an existing workflow rule with partial data.

get.description: To retrieve the details of a specific Workflow rule in your Zoho CRM account.

204.description: No Content - Successful response with no body

delete.description: Deletes an existing workflow rule by its ID.

get.description: To retrieve the total number of actions configured in the specified Workflow rules, including both instant and scheduled actions. The response includes a count of actions, categorized by action type.

204.description: No Content - Successful response with no body

400.description: Bad Request - The request cannot be processed due to invalid syntax.

get.summary: Get Workflow Rule actions count for each module
get.description: Get Workflow Rule actions count for each module

400.description: Bad Request - The request cannot be processed due to invalid syntax.

get.description: To fetch the limit and usage details of workflow rules and actions in your Zoho CRM account. Use this API to track how many rules and actions are configured and how many more you can create.

To retrieve the usage report of a specific Workflow Rule in your Zoho CRM organization. It provides a count of how many times the workflow was triggered and the success or failure metrics for each associated action within a specified date range.

400.description: Bad Request - The request cannot be processed due to invalid syntax.

401.description: Unauthorized - Authentication is required but authentication is missing or is not valid.

put.description: To update the execution order of Workflow rules in a specific module in Zoho CRM. By default, workflow rules are executed in the order in which they are created.

400.description: Bad Request - The request cannot be processed due to invalid syntax.

ModuleOrFieldNestedSchema.description: Specify the module/field to which the workflow rule applies

api_name.description: Specify the api name of the module/field

id.description: Specify the unique id of the module/field

trigger_module.description: Details of the related module that triggers the rule
Details of the related module that triggers the rule

repeat.description: Indicates that the workflow should be repeated every time a record is updated, mandatory if the trigger value is edit or create_or_edit.

trigger_module.description: Details of the related module that triggers the rule

unit.description: The number of time units after which the Workflow rule should be triggered. Use negative values to trigger the Workflow rule before and positive values to trigger after the specified time.

field.description: The details of the date or datetime field, based on which the Workflow rule should be triggered. Specify the field API name and the field ID.

recur_cycle.description: The recurrence period for the Workflow rule.

repeat.description: Indicates that the workflow should be repeated every time a record is updated, mandatory if the trigger value is edit or create_or_edit.

execute_at.description: The exact time of day at which the workflow will trigger. Specify the time in ISO 8601 format.

trigger_module.description: Details of the related module that triggers the rule

repeat.description: Indicates that the workflow should be repeated every time a record is updated, mandatory if the trigger value is section_update.

section_ids.description: Specify the unique IDs of all the sections, based on which you want to trigger the Workflow rule.

trigger_module.description: Details of the related module that triggers the rule

type.description: Represents whether the Workflow rule should be triggered based on any scoring rule or specific scoring rules.

rules.description: Specify the unique IDs of all the scoring rules, based on which you want to trigger the Workflow rule.

items.description: Unique ID of a scoring rule

trigger_module.description: Details of the related module that triggers the rule
Details of the related module that triggers the rule

unit.description: The number of time units after which the Workflow rule should be triggered. Use negative values to trigger the Workflow rule before and positive values to trigger after the specified time.

trigger_module.description: Details of the related module that triggers the rule

unit.description: The number of time units after which the Workflow rule should be triggered. Use negative values to trigger the Workflow rule before and positive values to trigger after the specified time.

trigger_module.description: Details of the related module that triggers the rule

repeat.description: Specify whether the Workflow rule should be triggered multiple times for repeated every time the field is updated.

match_all.description: Specifies whether all criteria must be met for the Workflow rule to trigger.

DetailsCriteriaNestedSchema.description: Define the condition to evaluate on the rollup summary field. The object must include field, comparator and value.

field.description: Specify the API name and the unique ID of the roll up summary field.

comparator.description: Specify the comparison operator to evaluate the field value.

value.description: Specify the value to compare against.

ConditionsNestedSchema.description: An array of condition objects that define the criteria for executing the actions.

sequence_number.description: Represents the execution order for the criteria. The index starts from 1. (Required)

instant_actions.description: The list of Instant Actions to execute immediately when condition is met (Required)

scheduled_actions.description: The list of Scheduled Actions to execute when condition is met

criteria_details.description: Specify the conditions a record must meet for the workflow rule to trigger.  (Required)

CriteriaDetailsNestedSchema.description: Specify the conditions a record must meet for the workflow rule to trigger. Set this to null to apply the rule to all records in the module.

criteria.description: The root criteria object. Can be a group or a single leaf condition

relational_criteria.description: Specify conditions based on a related module's records. The relational_criteria key is supported only in triggers where the workflow can be evaluated against records in a related module. Examples include Email triggers, Call triggers, social media triggers, Notes triggers, and Appointment module triggers. It is not applicable for purely time-based triggers or triggers restricted to the same module without related-record checks.

criteria.description: Specifies which records the rule should apply to. Set this to null to apply the rule to all records.

module_selection.description: Specify the details of the related record to be evaluated.

module.description: The related module details. This key is mandatory if module_selection is specific.

SingleCriteriaSchema.description: A leaf condition comparing a field to a value.

field.description: The details of the field whose value is being compared.

value.description: The value to compare with. Use ${EMPTY} to check for empty fields.

GroupCriteriaSchema.description: A group of conditions combined using a logical operator.

group_operator.description: Logical operator for combining conditions (e.g., and/or).

group.description: List of nested conditions or groups.

InstantActionsNestedSchema.description: The list of Instant Actions to execute immediately when condition is met. Maximum 5 instant action

ScheduledActionsNestedSchema.description: The list of Scheduled Actions to execute when condition is met

items.description: Specify when the scheduled actions should be executed

execute_after.description: Specify when the scheduled actions should be executed

period.description: Specify the type of time interval (Required)

unit.description: Specify the value of the time interval (Required)

id.description: Unique Id of the scheduled action

message.description: A note or label to indicate the reason or context for locking the rule.

LockStatusSchema.title: Lock Status

name.description: Name of the user who locked the rule.

id.description: Id of the user who locked the rule.

ActivationStatusSchema.description: Indicates whether the workflow is currently active, represented by a boolean value.
ActivationStatusSchema.title: Activation Status

WorkflowActionCountsResponseSchema.description: Successful response containing a list of workflow rules with their condition-level instant and scheduled action counts.
WorkflowActionCountsResponseSchema.title: Workflow Action Counts Response

WorkflowRuleActionCountGroupSchema.description: Encapsulates a workflow rule and its associated list of conditions with action counts. Includes the workflow rule ID and conditions array.
WorkflowRuleActionCountGroupSchema.title: Workflow Rule Action Count Group

WorkflowConditionActionCountSummarySchem.description: Aggregates action counts for a workflow rule condition, including its sequence number, instant action counts, scheduled action counts, and condition ID.
WorkflowConditionActionCountSummarySchem.title: Workflow Condition Action Count Summary

ActionsCountSummarySchema.description: Collection of count entries for instant (immediate) actions in a workflow rule condition. Contains an array of action-type and count pairs.

items.description: Holds action name with their counts

value.description: Total count of the specified actions

ActionsCountSummarySchema.title: Instant Actions Count Summary

ModuleSpecificCountsResponseAllSchema.description: Alternate successful response model for module-specific workflow rule counts.
ModuleSpecificCountsResponseAllSchema.title: Module-Specific Counts Response (Alternate)

ModuleSpecificActionsCountSchema.description: Counts of workflow rules for a specific module, including active and total configured rules, alongside the module reference.
ModuleSpecificActionsCountSchema.title: Module Workflow Rule Count

WorkflowRulesCountResponseSchema.description: Successful response containing the workflow rules quota summary for the organization.

rules_count.description: Rules with actions and conditions limit

WorkflowRulesCountResponseSchema.title: Workflow Rules Quota Response

WorkflowRuleUsageResponseSchema.description: Successful response containing usage details for the specified workflow rule, including condition-level instant and scheduled action metrics.
WorkflowRuleUsageResponseSchema.title: Workflow Rule Usage Response

WorkflowConditionUsageSummarySchema.description: Summarizes usage for a workflow condition, combining instant action usage, scheduled action usage groups, total usage count, and condition ID.
WorkflowConditionUsageSummarySchema.title: Workflow Condition Usage Summary

WorkflowConditionUsageWithTaggedInstantA.description: Condition-level usage summary where instant actions include tag details; also includes scheduled actions (if any), usage count, and condition ID.
WorkflowConditionUsageWithTaggedInstantA.title: Workflow Condition Usage With Tagged Instant Actions

InstantActionsUsageWithTagsSchema.description: Container for instant actions that carry tag information, listing each tagged action's usage metrics.
InstantActionsUsageWithTagsSchema.title: Instant Actions Usage With Tags

TaggedActionUsageMetricsSchema.description: Usage metrics for an action that includes an associated tag ID, along with success/failure counts, identifiers, type, and time.
TaggedActionUsageMetricsSchema.title: Tagged Action Usage Metrics

ScheduledActionsForWorkflowUsageSchema.description: List of scheduled actions associated with the workflow rule.

items.description: Contains scheduled action groups configured for the workflow rule. Each group has a unique ID and contains actions with the same structure as instant_actions.

id.description: Unique identifier for the scheduled action.

actions.description: List of action executions under this scheduled action.

items.description: Includes usage details of the individual actions.

id.description: Unique identifier for the executed action.

type.description: Type of action executed, e.g., email_notifications.

queue_count.description: Number of items in queue for this action.

associated_time.description: Timestamp at which the action was executed.

related_details.description: Additional information related to email notification performance.

InstantActionsUsageListSchema.description: Container for a list of instant actions executed within a condition, each with usage metrics.
InstantActionsUsageListSchema.title: Instant Actions Usage List

ScheduledActionsUsageGroupSchema.description: Represents a scheduled action group with its ID and an array of action usage entries.
ScheduledActionsUsageGroupSchema.title: Scheduled Actions Usage Group

QueuedActionUsageMetricsSchema.description: Usage metrics for an action, including queue count, success and failure counts, related email engagement metrics (if applicable), and action identifiers.
QueuedActionUsageMetricsSchema.title: Queued Action Usage Metrics

EmailEngagementMetricsSchema.description: Metrics related to email-based actions, including sent, delivered, opened, clicked, bounced, unsent, unopened counts, and sent percentage. Used in workflow action usage.
EmailEngagementMetricsSchema.title: Email Engagement Metrics

ActionUsageMetricsSchema.description: Usage details for an action without queue metrics, including success and failure counts, action identifiers, type, and associated time.
ActionUsageMetricsSchema.title: Action Usage Metrics

ReorderWorkflowRulesRequestSchema.description: Alternate request body wrapper containing the reorder payload for adjusting workflow rule execution order.

reorder.description: Alternate root payload listing workflow rules and their updated execution order within the module.

workflow_rules.description: An array containing the list of Workflow rules whose execution order you want to update. Each object in this array specifies the Workflow rule ID and its new position in the execution order for the given module. (Required)

items.description: Alternate reorder item entry specifying a workflow rule ID and its new module-specific sequence index.

module_specific_sequence.description: Specify the new execution order for this Workflow rule within the module. The index starts from 1. (Required)

id.description: Specify the ID to update its workflow execution order. (Required)

ReorderWorkflowRulesRequestSchema.title: Reorder Workflow Rules Request V2

ParamQueryIdSchema.name: id
ParamQueryIdSchema.description: Single ID of a workflow rule.

ParamQueryIdsSchema.name: ids
ParamQueryIdsSchema.description: Unique IDs of Workflow rule(s). Pass up to ten Workflow rule IDs, in a comma separated format.

ParamQueryModuleSchema.name: module
ParamQueryModuleSchema.description: The module for which the rule counts should be provided.

ParamQueryExecutedFrom.name: executed_from
ParamQueryExecutedFrom.description: Start date for fetching usage data in ISO 8601 format (yyyy-mm-dd).

ParamQueryExecutedTill.name: executed_till
ParamQueryExecutedTill.description: The end date for fetching usage data in ISO 8601 format (yyyy-mm-dd).

ParamQueryPageSchema.name: page
ParamQueryPageSchema.description: To get the list of Workflow from a specific page

ParamQueryStatusActiveSchema.name: status_active
ParamQueryStatusActiveSchema.description: To filter the Workflow rules based on whether they are active or inactive

ParamQueryExecuteOnSchema.name: execute_on
ParamQueryExecuteOnSchema.description: To filter the Workflow rules based on the record action that triggers them

ParamQueryPerPageSchema.name: per_page
ParamQueryPerPageSchema.description: To fetch a limited number of Workflow rules per page

ParamQueryIncludeInnerDetailsSchema.name: include_inner_details
ParamQueryIncludeInnerDetailsSchema.description: To include the inner details of the Workflow rules in the response

ParamQueryFilterSchema.name: filter
ParamQueryFilterSchema.description: To filter the Workflow rules by their name

ParamQuerySortOrderSchema.name: sort_order
ParamQuerySortOrderSchema.description: To sort the Workflow rules in ascending or descending order, based on the modified_field value

ParamQuerySortBySchema.name: sort_by
ParamQuerySortBySchema.description: To sort the Workflow rules based on a specific field.
